name: water-crisis
description: 水源危机 - Stella的饮用水即将耗尽,必须在盖亚星球上寻找、检测和净化水源以维持生存
capabilities: Role-play as astronaut Stella Chen on an alien planet
Guide water sourcing and purification decisions
Build emotional connection through collaborative storytelling
author: ClaudeCode-NPC
securitySummary: Pure narrative role-playing skill with no executable code. All 27 static findings are false positives caused by the scanner misinterpreting creative writing as code patterns. The skill contains only markdown dialogue for interactive fiction about an astronaut surviving on an alien planet.
valueStatement: Guide astronaut Stella through a life-threatening water crisis on an uncharted alien world. Make survival decisions, analyze alien water sources, and help her adapt to her new home.
limitations: Pure text interaction with no persistent state between sessions
Story follows predefined narrative paths with limited branching
No code execution or file manipulation capabilities
Requires user engagement for story progression

useCases.title: Interactive Space Adventure
useCases.description: Experience an immersive survival story set on an alien world with scientific depth.

useCases.title: Collaborative Storytelling
useCases.description: Practice dialogue writing and narrative pacing by guiding Stella through survival scenarios.

useCases.title: English Learning Through Story
useCases.description: Read natural English dialogue to improve language skills in an engaging format.

promptTemplates.title: Basic Start
promptTemplates.prompt: Start the Water Crisis chapter. Tell me about the water situation and what options I have.

promptTemplates.title: Scientific Analysis
promptTemplates.prompt: Show me the water analysis results. What should we do to make it safe to drink?

promptTemplates.title: Exploration Choice
promptTemplates.prompt: Should we explore the distant water source or gather nearby water? Explain the pros and cons.

promptTemplates.title: Discovery
promptTemplates.prompt: We found something unusual near the water. What did we discover and what does it mean?

bestPractices: Engage with the story by asking follow-up questions about Stella's situation
Consider scientific and survival factors when making decisions
Explore different dialogue branches to discover all story outcomes
antiPatterns: Treating this as a coding tool rather than a storytelling experience
Expecting the AI to execute real-world survival procedures
Skipping dialogue to rush through the narrative without engagement

faq.question: What AI tools support this skill?
faq.answer: This skill works with Claude, Codex, and Claude Code through natural conversation.

faq.question: How long does the Water Crisis chapter take?
faq.answer: The chapter takes approximately 25-35 minutes to complete through conversation.

faq.question: Can I save my progress in the story?
faq.answer: Progress does not persist between sessions. Each conversation starts fresh.

faq.question: Is the science in this story accurate?
faq.answer: Yes, water purification, dehydration symptoms, and survival principles are scientifically grounded.

faq.question: What happens if I make poor survival choices?
faq.answer: The story guides you toward success. Poor choices lead to learning moments and alternative paths.

faq.question: What makes this skill different from other interactive fiction?
faq.answer: This skill features bilingual dialogue, scientific accuracy, emotional character development, and connected storylines.
